hero.headline: Cozy coworking space in Plovdiv for freelances and remote workers

ctaSecondary.label: Discover how we can help you

paragraphs: You come in with your laptop, tempted by our great prices, but you stay because something about the space just clicks.
It's warm. It's calm. It feels like people, not just desks.
Enjoy fast wifi, cozy corners, and a community-oriented coworking space right in the heart of Plovdiv.

whyRaboteriya.heading: Why Raboteriya?
whyRaboteriya.paragraph: At Raboteriya, everything is designed to make your workday easier, calmer, and more productive - whether you're here for a few hours or the whole day.

features.title: FAST WIFI
features.description: Work without interruptions on reliable, high-speed Coool box internet.

features.title: DRINKS & SNACKS
features.description: Enjoy coffee, tea, snacks, and access to our fully stocked kitchenette.

features.title: FLEXIBLE SPACES
features.description: Set up comfortably at spacious desks or a cozy corner.

features.title: AFFORDABLE MEMBERSHIPS
features.description: Access some of the most affordable memberships in the city.

features.title: COMMUNITY
features.description: Work alongside the friendliest people instead of sitting alone at home.

features.title: 24/7 ACCESS
features.description: Ideal for professionals who don't fit into a 9-5 routine.

theSpace.heading: The space
theSpace.paragraph: Raboteriya is designed to support different work styles - from deep focus to relaxed collaboration, with thoughtful spaces and everything you need included.

cards.title:
COMMUNITY
SPACE
cards.description: A space with atmosphere where working next to others feels motivating, not distracting.

cards.title:
QUIET
ROOM
cards.description: A dedicated room for those moments when you need absolute silence and deep focus to get work done.

cards.title:
PHONE
BOOTH
cards.description: A private phone booth for Zoom meetings, calls, and anything that shouldn't happen at a shared desk.

cards.title: THE GARDEN
cards.description: A small but much-loved space where we host BBQs, take breaks, and enjoy a drink or fresh air.

memberships.heading: Memberships, Day Passes & Pricing
memberships.paragraph: Simple, flexible and affordable options - whether you're visiting for a day or making Raboteriya your work home.

cards.title: STANDARD PASS
excludedInclusions: Pause your membership for one week when you're on holiday or away

cards.title: PREMIUM PLAN
inclusions: Pause your membership for one week when you're on holiday or away

extras.heading: ... and a few more extras
extras.paragraph: Everything is included in your day pass or membership - we don't believe in hidden fees.

testimonials.heading: A few words from our members

items.quote: The place has such a cozy and welcoming atmosphere. The owners are absolute sunshines - they genuinely care about their clients and always go the extra mile to make everyone feel comfortable. They're open to new ideas and are constantly thinking about how to make the coworking space even better. You can really feel the heart and passion behind every decision that has been made.
items.name: Gergana Andreeva

items.quote: I've been working at Coworking Space Raboteriya Plovdiv for nearly a year, and it has been an absolute pleasure! The environment is both professional and fun, making it the perfect place to focus and connect with like-minded people. The owners are truly wonderful—friendly, approachable, and always willing to help or enhance the space based on members' needs.
items.name: Anton Tonev

items.quote: Such a lovely space which is filled with even lovelier people. The atmosphere is soothing and perfect to work in, it is spacious and welcoming. The desks and work spaces are large and well spaced out, meaning you can stay here all day and get on with any work necessary. There is a kitchen area which is fully equipped with a microwave, kettle, coffee machine and fridge. I really couldn't recommend this space enough.
items.name: Liz Shamsee

items.quote: Top place to work, very nice atmosphere! They offer coffee and tea, people are always open for conversation, even for 10 minutes a day it is a great relief from the stressful everyday life. There are two separate rooms, which makes it convenient for holding business meetings. Super fresh!
items.name: Valya Matovska

items.quote: A great place where you can combine work with fun. Fresh and pleasant atmosphere with friendly, smiling and radiant people. I recommend!
items.name: Vasil Koychev

items.quote: Gorgeous place, I highly recommend it! Very cozy, calm, friendly atmosphere and everything you need to feel good while working!
items.name: Megi Ivanova

items.quote: Cws is seriously amazing, It's open 24/7! The environment there makes me be so productive with loads of comfy seating to choose from. It's always clean, plus they've got coffee and snacks, which is a major win. Location is so convenient too, around the corner there is a shop and many street food places. Totally recommend it!
items.name: Maya

items.quote: This is my favourite place to get some work done! The atmosphere and design is great. I love that there's amenities to help me get through my long work days at the space. The space is also located in an ideal area, close to many shops and establishments used by students and workers. It honestly feels like a second home, and the owner is so sweet & accommodating, which makes it a pleasure to always come back. I recommend this place to anyone who wants to work in a lovely, comfortable environment.
items.name: Sinat Azeez

items.quote: Such a warm and inviting place to get my work done! Not to mention, the management is amazing, always super responsive and makes the space feel like a home away from home ❤️
items.name: Berry Jude

items.quote: Absolutely obsessed with this place!! It has everything I need and so much more. Love the chill atmosphere and I'm always able to get so much work done whenever I visit. Plus the owner is amazing and super welcoming. Great place to work. Super comfortable and very well thought of, couldn't have asked for a better place to be!!
items.name: Gamze Zengin

items.quote: Really nice co-working place! Owners are chill and fix problems fast. It's cozy, convenient location, and price is fair. Also, new coffee beans are excellent :)
items.name: Ivaylo Petrov

items.quote: The best place for coworking in Plovdiv. I highly recommend it 🙌
items.name: Nadejda Ilieva

items.quote: Very nice atmosphere, I liked it. Each work area has its own style and feel. It's obvious that it was made with love and care. The prices are competitive. I use it on days when I'm tired of working from home in shorts!
items.name: Martin Gatev

items.quote: Very cosy place, extremely polite hosts, nice environment. Highly recommend for teams, events, and freelancers.
items.name: Tsanislav Georgiev

items.quote: Whether you're looking for a spacious place to work at, or a quiet one so you can be more focused they have it all. Extremely friendly atmosphere, amazing host, chill vibes and comfy couches. They are the best at what they provide!!
items.name: Kiro Iliev
